__fixture__.name: workspace_backpressure_snapshot_required_switch
__fixture__.scenario: Consumer subscribed with backpressure_mode = coalesced falls behind. After the producer coalesces two pending deltas, the consumer escalates to backpressure_mode = snapshot_required. The store emits resync_required with stale_reason = causality_lost to announce that causal continuity has been abandoned; a fresh snapshot follows on a bumped snapshot_epoch under the new backpressure mode.

caused_by.note: backpressure switched to snapshot_required; causal continuity abandoned
